label: Graphic state
description: Defines a named graphic state for pawn render nodes. Referenced by Keyframe.graphicState and CurveKey.graphicState to switch the visual of a node at a specific animation tick.

defaultGraphicData.label: Default graphic data
defaultGraphicData.description: Graphic settings applied when this state is active. Reuses the shared GraphicData schema.

applySkinColorTint.label: Apply skin color tint
applySkinColorTint.description: If true, the pawn's skin color is applied as a tint over the graphic. Used for graphics that should match mutant or hediff-affected skin color.

basic-graphic-state.label: Basic graphic state
basic-graphic-state.description: A minimal graphic state definition identified by defName.
